Id1.text: Eagle was the successor for American Motors who make the AMC Matador.

Id2.text: American Motors Co, who manufactured the AMC Matador, was succeeded by Eagle.

Id3.text: American Motors Co was succeeded by Eagle and manufactured AMC Matador.
